headline: Man's 'No Drama' Dating Profile Bio Has Been The Dramatic Focal Point Of 47 Arguments
summary: Every woman who matches with him immediately asks 'so why do you have to specify that?'
fullBody: Tyler NoDrama wrote 'no drama' in his Hinge bio. He has since been accused of 'bringing drama by mentioning drama' 47 times. 'It's not dramatic to say you don't like drama,' Tyler argued, dramatically. His matches have started a group chat called 'Tyler's Drama Support Group.' Tyler is now 'taking a break from dating for his mental health,' which he announced in a very dramatic 12-part Instagram story.
